titles: YOUR CAT IS A LAZY CHEAT
POV Your Cat Owns the Thermostat
captions: Cats can be right or left pawed
Plays with prey. Then gifts it.
Burns in sun. Judges your decor.
Owns the couch. You’re a guest.
Bengal chatty? Your therapist's on mute.
